title: RotationFollowMode Property
description:
RotationFollowMode Property

RotationFollowMode Property

This property sets the direction in which following the direction of rotation is enabled during the execution of the force guide object.

Value	Description

Disabled	The direction of rotation is not followed.

Tilt	Following motion in the direction of tilt.

Rotate	Following motion around the axis specified for the direction of insertion.

TiltRotate	Following motion in the direction of rotation at all positions.

Default: TiltRotate
